# Vendored third-party libraries

These files are exact, unmodified official release builds copied from npm.

| File | Library | Version | Official source |
| ---- | ------- | ------- | --------------- |
| `floating-ui.core.umd.min.js` | @floating-ui/core | 1.7.5 | https://unpkg.com/@floating-ui/core@1.7.5/dist/floating-ui.core.umd.min.js |
| `floating-ui.dom.umd.min.js` | @floating-ui/dom | 1.7.6 | https://unpkg.com/@floating-ui/dom@1.7.6/dist/floating-ui.dom.umd.min.js |

To update: bump the exact-pinned versions in `package.json`, run `npm install`,
copy the files from `node_modules/@floating-ui/<pkg>/dist/`, and update this table.
